message:
fix(core): add missing plan_frame_pacing and update_pacing_state_after_frame methods to resize_scheduler

Commit 9406ee81 added calls to plan_frame_pacing() and
update_pacing_state_after_frame() but did not include the method
implementations, breaking compilation. Add the missing methods:
pacing_budget_bounds, normalize_vsync_refresh_hz,
frame_interval_us_for_refresh, nominal_frame_interval_us,
scale_budget_by_vsync, plan_frame_pacing, and
update_pacing_state_after_frame.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
